content: Hi, my name is Alice and I'm building a productivity app.
Great, what stack are you considering?
I'm using Rust for backend and React for frontend.
Good split. Let's define your API contracts first.
Please always keep responses short unless I ask for detail.
Understood. I'll default to concise mode.
Now design a table schema for tasks and projects.
Use tasks(id, title, status, project_id, due_at) and projects(id, name).
